chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. C.P. No.D-146 of 2020 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 12-06-2025 Mr. Irfan Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. S.M. Naveed Farooqui, Advocate for Respondents No.5 to 8. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional Advocate General Sindh along with Mr. Ghulam Hyder Arain, Additional Director Land Management, P&DC, HDA and Anwar Khanzada, Assistant Director, HDA. -.-.-.-.- This petition is disposed of in terms of the judgment dated 12.06.2025 passed in connected C.P. No. D-882 of 2020. The said judgment shall apply mutatis mutandis to this petition. JUDGE JUDGE Irfan Ali
